```cpp
__global__ __vector__ void simplesoftmax_custom(GM_ADDR x, GM_ADDR max, GM_ADDR sum, GM_ADDR z, GM_ADDR workspace,
                                                GM_ADDR tiling)
{

    MyCustomKernel::VecTiling tilingData;
    CopyTiling(&tilingData, tiling);
    MyCustomKernel::KernelSoftmax op;
    op.Init(x, max, sum, z, tilingData, &pipe);
    op.Process();
}
```

3. The output: same shape as input
